name: Omon.mlotstmin
title: Minimum Ocean Mixed Layer Thickness Defined by Delta Sigma T of 0.03 kg m-3 referenced to the model level closest to 10 m depth
description: Sigma T is potential density referenced to ocean surface. Defined by Sigma T of 0.03 kg m-3 wrt to model level closest to 10 m depth.
processing note: dsigmat coordinate added to clarify definition. CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Dimensions - CMIP6:longitude latitude time CMIP7:longitude latitude time deltasigt, CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: mean time: minimum CMIP7:area: mean where sea time: minimum,
